next_action: Keep the current description and open a new candidate only when fresh route evidence appears.

candidate_registry.name: yao-meta-skill
candidate_registry.label: Current
candidate_registry.description: Create, refactor, evaluate, and package agent skills from workflows, prompts, transcripts, docs, or notes. Use when asked to create a skill, turn a repeated process into a reusable skill, improve an existing skill, add evals, or package a skill for team reuse.

candidate_registry.name: yao-meta-skill
candidate_registry.label: Artifact Aware
candidate_registry.description: Create, refactor, evaluate, and package agent skills from workflows, prompts, transcripts, docs, or notes. Trigger when requests mention workflows, prompts, transcripts, or docs and the job is to create a skill, turn a repeated process into a reusable skill, or improve an existing skill.

candidate_registry.name: yao-meta-skill
candidate_registry.label: Boundary
candidate_registry.description: Create, refactor, evaluate, and package agent skills from workflows, prompts, transcripts, docs, or notes. Use when asked to create a skill, turn a repeated process into a reusable skill, or improve an existing skill. Do not use for summary-only requests, translation-only requests, or plain documentation tasks.
